overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian robes walking through a historic city at night. The journey progresses from a cypress-lined avenue through an open plaza with an obelisk and into a bustling street with stone buildings.

events.description: group of mounted NPCs on horses passes by on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a tree-lined dirt path in ancient Egyptian robes

notable_agents.action: group of riders on horses passing by on the right side

entered.detail: tall dark cypress trees lining the left side of the avenue
ancient stone wall with hieroglyphic carvings on the right side
lit torch brazier providing warm orange light
stone building with carved hieroglyphs visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow avenue lined with tall cypress trees on the left and a stone wall on the right. The path is illuminated by torch braziers. Around the 5-second mark, a group of mounted NPCs passes by on the right, heading in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central obelisk under moonlight

events.description: exits the tree-lined avenue into a wide open plaza area
full moon becomes visible in the night sky, increasing ambient blue light

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the distant obelisk and city buildings

entered.detail: tall stone obelisk standing in the center of the plaza
bright full moon visible in the cloudy night sky
open dirt and stone ground of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza as the character leaves the tree avenue behind. A prominent stone obelisk stands in the center distance, and the full moon becomes visible in the sky around 20 seconds, casting a blue glow over the open area. The vegetation becomes sparse and scattered palm trees appear in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian city street with columned buildings

events.description: enters the built-up urban street from the open plaza
slight navigation around pedestrians in the busier street section

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy street, navigating between pedestrians and observing the columned architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white robes walking along the building side
mounted guard on horse patroling the street

entered.detail: stone buildings with prominent columns and balconies typical of ancient Egyptian architecture
palm trees lining the right side of the street
fabric awning over a market stall on the left building

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bustling urban street with stone-paved ground and ancient Egyptian buildings featuring columns and balconies on the left. Palm trees line the right side. The crowd density increases to moderate with various pedestrians walking about, including a mounted guard. The obelisk recedes into the distance as the buildings enclose the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, tree-lined avenue into a wide moonlit plaza and finally into a dense urban street. It begins with the character walking along a narrow path flanked by tall cypress trees and a stone wall, illuminated by the warm flicker of torch braziers as mounted riders pass by in the opposite direction. As the avenue ends, the scene opens into a vast plaza where the environment shifts to a cool blue glow under a visible full moon, centering on a prominent stone obelisk amidst sparse vegetation and distant palm trees. The camera then transitions from the open square into a bustling city street, where the horizon is enclosed by stone buildings with columns and balconies. Finally, the obelisk recedes into the distance as the path becomes crowded with pedestrians and mounted guards moving through the paved urban corridor.
